page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m4.4xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture utilizing an AMD EPYC processor running at a clock speed of 2.25 GHz. The instance is configured with 16 dedicated vCPUs mapping to 16 physical cores with a single thread per core, paired with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, requiring external block storage for operating system and application data. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio offer a stable resource density suitable for workloads requiring consistent compute performance without the overhead of hyperthreading or the premium cost of specialized memory-optimized or compute-optimized hardware classes.

Given its balanced resource profile, the ecs.u2a-c1m4.4xlarge is designed for general-purpose workloads. Appropriate use cases include medium-scale web serving, application servers, containerized microservices, build systems, and enterprise applications that require dedicated CPU resources and moderate memory capacity without demanding high-speed local storage or hardware acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m4.4xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor and powered by an AMD EPYC processor. Operating at 2.25 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, it provides 16 dedicated vCPUs across 16 physical cores with a single thread per core, alongside 64.0 GB of system memory. This configuration establishes a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. The instance does not feature local storage or integrated GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage, and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps. With its dedicated CPU allocation and balanced resource profile, this instance offers a stable, cost-efficient platform for general-purpose workloads. It is well-suited for application servers, containerized microservices, web serving, and enterprise applications that require consistent compute performance without the need for specialized hardware accelerators or local NVMe storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m4.4xlarge is a general-purpose KVM instance with 16 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 6 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for balanced enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m4.4xlarge is a general-purpose KVM instance featuring 16 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 6 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and a stable one-to-four virtual CPU to memory ratio.
bullet_points: 16 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs with single-thread-per-core allocation
64.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 resource ratio
6 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for reliable connectivity
KVM hypervisor-based virtualization on x86_64 architecture
No local storage or GPU resources included in the base configuration
Suited for web serving, application servers, and containerized microservices
